payload.label: cabinet
payload.short_description: tall dark wooden cabinet right edge-cropped
payload.long_description: Tall, dark-stained wooden cabinet door with a recessed central panel and raised outer frame molding; decorative scalloped/ornate trim visible along the left edge and the right side of the cabinet is cut off by the crop; surface shows a low-gloss varnish with minor scuffs and a faint reflective patch near the upper left; no distinct hardware visible in the cropped area. Approximate distance ~1.5 m from camera.
